stemHtml: What is the influence of decreasing aeroplane mass on M<sub>CRIT</sub> at constant IAS? (n=1)

options.b: M<sub>CRIT</sub> increases as a result of flying at a smaller angle of attack.
options.c: M<sub>CRIT</sub> increases as a result of compressibility effects.
options.d: M<sub>CRIT</sub> decreases as a result of flying at a greater angle of attack.
